code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut sum = 0
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  if i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_ws = true
    else
      is_ws = false
    end
  end

  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          sum = sum + v * 2
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("result=#{sum}")
